inputs.label: Total Production
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced in the period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Zeitraum produzierten Einheiten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites sur la période.

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of defective or non-conforming units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defective or non-conforming units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı veya uygun olmayan birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl fehlerhafter oder nicht konformer Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités défectueuses ou non conformes.
Quantité totale de matière première consommée.

inputs.label: Waste Material
inputs.businessContext: Material wasted as scrap, trimmings, rejects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material wasted as scrap, trimmings, rejects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fire, kırpıntı, reddedilenler olarak israf edilen malzeme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Als Ausschuss, Verschnitt oder Ausschuss verschwendetes Material.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire de la matière première.

inputs.label: Defect Reduction Target
inputs.businessContext: Target percentage reduction in defect units (e.g., 20% means reduce defective units by one fifth).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target percentage reduction in defect units (e.g., 20% means reduce defective units by one fifth).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı birimlerde hedeflenen yüzde azalma (örneğin, %20, hatalı birimleri beşte bir oranında azaltmak anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielprozentuale Reduzierung der Fehlereinheiten (z. B. 20 % bedeutet Reduzierung der fehlerhaften Einheiten um ein Fünftel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage cible de réduction des unités défectueuses (ex. : 20% signifie réduire d'un cinquième).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
